basics.name: Jordan Rivera
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Generalist engineer with experience across backend systems and infrastructure.

work.name: Bluebird Labs
highlights: Own the billing service handling 3M+ transactions/month.
Introduced contract testing between the checkout and payments services.

work.name: Foobar Cloud
highlights: Built the org's Terraform-managed multi-account AWS baseline.
Cut CI pipeline time from 22 to 6 minutes by parallelizing test shards.

work.name: Acme Corp
highlights: Designed and shipped the payments service handling 2M+ transactions/month.
Migrated the monolith's checkout flow to a NestJS microservice, cutting p95 latency by 40%.

work.name: Northwind Traders
highlights: Cut cloud spend 45% by migrating staging environments to spot instances.
Owned the notifications and billing services end-to-end.
Co-designed the product's core domain model on Node.js, TypeORM, and PostgreSQL.
Shipped customer-facing features across the checkout and onboarding flows.
Maintained the team's internal tooling: VPN, DNS, and secrets management.

work.name: Contoso Systems
highlights: Reduced production incident MTTR from 3 hours to 25 minutes.
Wrote the on-call runbooks still in use by the team today.
Introduced structured logging across every service.

work.name: Initech Data
highlights: Maintained a COBOL batch-processing pipeline during a phased decommission.

work.name: Widget Industries
highlights: Administered a 60-host Linux fleet, automating patching with Ansible.
Ran the on-call rotation for internal infrastructure incidents.

projects.name: Inventory Sync Service
projects.description: Idempotent inventory reconciliation between the warehouse system and the storefront.
highlights: Built idempotent sync jobs processing 500K SKUs nightly.
Reduced reconciliation errors by 90% after switching to event sourcing.

projects.name: Internal Dashboard
projects.description: Ops dashboard surfacing service health and deploy history.
highlights: Shipped a self-service deploy dashboard used by every team.

projects.name: Homelab Automation
projects.description: Personal Kubernetes homelab used to prototype infrastructure patterns.
highlights: Automated a 3-node k3s cluster with GitOps via Flux.

awards.title: Employee of the Year
awards.summary: Recognized for leading the payments service migration.
